import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 25, 
    'description': 'v25 reactive heuristic (follow on detector>0.05|dist<3.5 at base=0.25+0.12*err clipped[0.15,0.4] with aligned_vel=0.22, pure-rotate if |angle|>0.3, ang_k=-7.5, OA only detector<0.25+min_front<0.85 w/ robust center40%/left-right30% depth valid>0.02+center bias, backup<0.85, seek=0.8 when far, tighter rotate+stronger facing+speed match for stability vs dynamic oracle, per-step safe/streak/max_streak/detector/collision tracking with fixed dict-safe collision_delta, full JSON contract). Tuned for longer streaks/safe accumulation.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v25 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v25 uses base_follow=0.25 (better human speed match), tighter pure-rotate@0.3rad, ang_k=7.5, refined OA thresholds/slices, aligned vel reduction, robust collision helper.')
